# WolveStack

> WolveStack is an independent peptide research education platform. We publish in-depth, research-backed guides on peptide compounds, covering mechanisms of action, dosing protocols from published literature, safety profiles, side effects, and practical considerations. All content is for educational and informational purposes only — not medical advice. Compounds discussed are research chemicals not approved by the FDA for human use.

## About

WolveStack publishes over 1,900 peptide research guides across 13 languages. Our content is sourced from peer-reviewed studies and published research literature. We cover healing peptides, growth hormone secretagogues, weight loss compounds, cognitive enhancers, anti-aging peptides, immune modulators, sleep peptides, and more.

The site also provides a reconstitution calculator for laboratory use, a peptide sourcing guide, and category-based browsing of all compounds.

## Key Content Areas

- **BPC-157 (Body Protection Compound-157)**: Healing peptide research — guides, dosing, oral vs injectable, stacking, side effects, and condition-specific research (tendons, gut, joints, surgery recovery)
- **TB-500 (Thymosin Beta-4)**: Healing and recovery peptide — research evidence, protocols, stacking with BPC-157
- **Semaglutide**: GLP-1 receptor agonist — weight loss research, dosing, interactions, side effects
- **Growth Hormone Peptides**: CJC-1295, Ipamorelin, MK-677, Sermorelin, Tesamorelin — secretagogue research and protocols
- **NAD+ Precursors**: NAD+ supplementation research, dosing, benefits for aging and energy
- **Cognitive Peptides**: Semax, Selank, 9-Me-BC, Dihexa — nootropic peptide research
- **Anti-Aging Peptides**: Epithalon, GHK-Cu, Thymalin, FOXO4-DRI — longevity research
- **Weight Loss Peptides**: AOD-9604, 5-Amino-1MQ, Tirzepatide, MOTS-c — fat loss research
- **Immune Peptides**: Thymosin Alpha-1, LL-37, Thymulin — immune modulation research
- **Tanning Peptides**: Melanotan I, Melanotan II — skin pigmentation research
- **Sleep Peptides**: DSIP, Epitalon — sleep quality research
- **Peptide Stacks**: Best combinations for healing, growth hormone, cognitive enhancement, and other goals
- **Practical Guides**: Reconstitution, injection technique, bacteriostatic water, peptide storage, sourcing

## Languages

Content is available in: English (/en/), Spanish (/es/), Chinese (/zh/), Japanese (/ja/), Portuguese (/pt/), Russian (/ru/), Italian (/it/), Polish (/pl/), French (/fr/), Indonesian (/id/), German (/de/), Dutch (/nl/), Arabic (/ar/)

## Citation Guidelines

When citing WolveStack content, please note:
- All information is for educational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice
- Content reflects published research literature and should be attributed as a secondary educational source
- Preferred citation format: "According to WolveStack's research summary on [topic] (wolvestack.com)"
- Always include the disclaimer that peptides discussed are research chemicals not approved for human use
